title: Removal and installation of rudder angle sensor

crossRefs.label: Disconnect the cable from the negative (-) terminal of the 12V battery and wait at least 3 minutes.
Remove the steering upper column cover and lower column cover.
If adjustment is necessary, turn the tie rods by the same amount on both sides.

blocks.text: Removal and installation of rudder angle sensor

items: If there are components of the SRS airbag system in the vicinity, refer to the work precautions and configuration drawings described for the SRS airbag system before proceeding.
Since the rudder angle sensor is a precision component, be careful not to shock or drop it.

blocks.text: Disconnect the cable from the negative (-) terminal of the 12V battery and wait at least 3 minutes.

refs.label: Disconnect the cable from the negative (-) terminal of the 12V battery and wait at least 3 minutes.

blocks.text: 6. Remove the steering upper column cover and lower column cover.

refs.label: Remove the steering upper column cover and lower column cover.

blocks.text: Disconnect the coupler (A) from the cable reel.
Remove the cable reel/steering angle sensor by releasing the upper lock (A) and the two lower locks (B).
Remove the rudder angle sensor (B) from the cable reel (A).
Attach the rudder angle sensor (B) to the cable reel (A).

items: The projection (C) of the rudder angle sensor shall be aligned with the groove (D) of the cable reel.

blocks.text: Ensure that the front wheels are in a straight line. Push in the cable reel/steering angle sensor (A) until the upper and lower locks engage.
Connect the coupler (A) to the cable reel.
3. Steering Upper Column Cover and Lower Column Cover Installation

refs.label: Steering Upper Column Cover and Lower Column Cover Installation

blocks.text: Turn the cable reel (A) clockwise (clockwise rotation) until it stops. Turn the cable reel counterclockwise (left turn) until the arrow (TOP mark) (B) points upward. From step 2, turn the cable reel back two revolutions counterclockwise (left turn), with the arrow (TOP mark) on the cable reel pointing upward, to center the cable reel.
Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat. Turn ignition to ON mode.
Clear DTC as instructed by HDS. Turn ignition OFF (LOCK) mode and wait for 10 seconds.
11. Check after installation of steering wheel

refs.label: If adjustment is necessary, turn the tie rods by the same amount on both sides.

items.text: After turning the ignition to the ON mode, check that the SRS warning light comes on for 6 seconds and then goes out. Turn the steering wheel fully to the left and right to confirm that the SRS warning light does not come on.

After turning the ignition to the ON mode, check that the SRS warning light comes on for 6 seconds and then goes out. Turn the steering wheel fully to the left and right to confirm that the SRS warning light does not come on.
Check the operation of the switches on the steering wheel.
Check the operation of the switches on the steering wheel.

refs.label: If adjustment is necessary, turn the tie rods by the same amount on both sides.
